title: ipomoea chaetophora
intro: Ipomoea chaetophora, also known as the hairy morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea chaetophora include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea chaetophora can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are typically taken orally to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
